# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: third-party-api-serviceentry
spec:
  hosts:
    - third-party-api.example.com
  ports:
    - number: 443
      name: tls
      protocol: HTTPS
  resolution: DNS
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: third-party-api-virtualservice
spec:
  hosts:
    - third-party-api.example.com
  gateways:
    - istio-ingressgateway
  http:
    - route:
        - destination:
            host: third-party-api.example.com
            port:
              number: 443

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-database-serviceentry
spec:
  hosts:
    - database.example.com
  ports:
    - number: 5432
      name: tcp
      protocol: TCP
  resolution: DNS
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-database-virtualservice
spec:
  hosts:
    - database.example.com
  gateways:
    - istio-ingressgateway
  tcp:
    - route:
        - destination:
            host: database.example.com
            port:
              number: 5432
